memory_hint:
This is a known recurring issue. The temporary fix is: What are metaclasses in Python?.

A metaclass is the class of a class. A class defines how an instance of the class (i.e. an object) behaves while a metaclass defines how a class behaves. A class is. This works for now but you will need to apply it again when the issue returns. The root cause is
